sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Crestview Partners sells select water solutions (WTTR) shares for $46.8m
feed.summary: Crestview Partners, a major shareholder in Select Water Solutions (NASDAQ:WTTR), sold over 3 million shares for $46.8 million. The transaction occurred as the stock neared its 52-week high after an 83% gain. This sale comes amidst other company news, including a dividend announcement, an analyst upgrade, and a public stock offering.

feed.title: Valmont Industries Sees Major Investment from Daugherty Foundation
feed.summary: The Robert B. Daugherty Foundation has acquired a significant stake in Valmont Industries, purchasing 250,000 shares valued at approximately $100.58 million. This investment now represents 100% of the foundation's portfolio, signaling strong institutional confidence in Valmont Industries' long-term growth potential due to its role in infrastructure and agricultural products. Other major investors have also adjusted their holdings, suggesting broad institutional support for the company.

feed.title: Virax Biolabs Announces Full Exercise of Pre-Funded Warrants From $5 Million Private Placement
feed.summary: Virax Biolabs Group Ltd. announced the full exercise of pre-funded warrants from a $5 million private placement initiated in December 2025. This exercise, completed by April 10, 2026, increased the company's ordinary shares outstanding to 19,923,432, converting the financing into equity. Virax Biolabs is a UK-based life sciences and diagnostics company.

feed.title: Chipotle opens Odessa restaurant with first Chipotlane
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is set to open a new location in Odessa, Texas, on April 14, featuring the city's first Chipotlane, a drive-thru for digital orders. The restaurant, located at 8009 State Highway 191 Westbound Service Road, will operate daily from 10:45 a.m. to 10 p.m. In addition to its regular menu, Chipotle will offer a limited-time Chicken al Pastor, cilantro lime sauce, and high-protein menu options.

feed.title: Blackstone Digital Infrastructure Trust files for IPO (BX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Blackstone Digital Infrastructure Trust, a newly formed company focused on acquiring and owning mission-critical data center assets, filed a prospectus for an IPO. This move indicates Blackstone's expansion into the digital infrastructure sector, aiming to capitalize on the modern digital economy. The filing was made on Friday.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Announces Pricing of Tender Offers for Any and All of its Outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy, Inc. announced the pricing of its tender offers to purchase for cash its outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. The offers are set to expire on April 10, 2026, and the company expects to pay the consideration plus accrued interest on April 13, 2026, with a guaranteed delivery procedure extending to April 14, 2026. The company advises note holders to carefully review the Offer to Purchase before making any decisions.

feed.title: Barclays adjusts Booking Holdings stock price target for stock split
feed.summary: Barclays has adjusted its price target for Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) to $220.00 from $5,500.00, maintaining an Overweight rating. This change reflects the company's recent 25-1 stock split, which went into effect this week. Analyst Ross Sandler updated share count, EPS, and dividend projections to account for the split, while gross booking value, revenue, and EBITDA forecasts remain unchanged.

feed.title: Whirlpool picks Ohio for $60M factory, adds 150 jobs
feed.summary: Whirlpool is building a new $60 million factory in Perrysburg, Ohio, which is expected to create 150 new jobs. This expansion highlights Whirlpool's continued investment in the region and its manufacturing capabilities. The article also touches on other local business news, including the Michelin Guide's arrival in Cleveland and new warehouse developments.

feed.title: MSCI Inc. stock (US55354G1004): Is index dominance enough to drive sustained U.S. investor gains?
feed.summary: The article discusses MSCI Inc.'s pivotal role in the U.S. investment landscape through its index and analytics products, which power trillions in assets and influence everything from ETFs to retirement funds. It highlights how MSCI's offerings, including ESG and risk management tools, provide a competitive edge and recurring revenue despite market volatility. The piece also addresses potential risks for MSCI, such as regulatory scrutiny and competition, while emphasizing its continued importance for U.S. investors.

feed.title: Pfizer Options Spot-On: On April 10th, 104.09K Contracts Were Traded, With 2.48 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On April 10th, Pfizer saw significant options trading activity, with 104,090 contracts traded. This high volume indicates considerable investor interest, especially given the existing open interest of 2.48 million contracts.

feed.title: MKC.V Price Today: McCormick & Company, Incorporated Voting CS Stock Price, Quote & Chart | MEXC
feed.summary: This article provides the current stock price, key market data, and performance analysis for McCormick & Company, Incorporated Voting CS (MKC.V). It details the company's background as a leading global manufacturer of spices and flavorings, outlines steps for buying its stock on MEXC, and answers frequently asked questions regarding its financials, dividend policy, and market classification. The stock is currently trading at $53.82, up +4.54% from its previous close, but has shown a weak performance over the last year.

feed.title: INVESTOR NOTICE: Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management (APO) on behalf of investors who suffered substantial losses. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo and its executives made false statements regarding the firm's relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, leading to a significant drop in stock value after investigative reports revealed deeper connections. Investors who purchased APO securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, have until May 1, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Fastenal to Pay Dividend at $0.24 a share, Payable May 26 to Shareholders of Record on April 28
feed.summary: Fastenal Company announced a cash dividend of $0.24 per share. This dividend is payable on May 26, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 28, 2026. The announcement was made on April 10, 2026, at 04:43 pm EDT.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Costco (COST) Could Change Following March’s Double-Digit Sales And E-Commerce Surge
feed.summary: Costco (COST) reported strong March 2026 net sales growth of 11.3% to US$28.41 billion, with comparable sales and e-commerce surging across all markets despite one less shopping day. This performance, driven by ancillary categories and significant digital growth, reinforces Costco's value-focused model and ongoing expansion. While concerns about margin pressure from labor and supply chain costs persist, these robust sales may challenge cautious analyst predictions and strengthen the investment narrative for the company.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] VisionWave Holdings, Inc. Amended Passive Investment Disclosure
feed.summary: Magic Internacional Argentina FC S.L. LLC has filed an amended Schedule 13G indicating beneficial ownership of 753,013 shares of VisionWave Holdings, Inc.'s common stock, representing 3.8% of the class. The filing, dated April 9, 2026, grants the entity sole voting and dispositive power over these shares. This is considered a minor passive investor disclosure, as the ownership is below 5% and suggests no intent to acquire control or dispose of shares currently.

feed.title: Union Pacific’s Big Boy begins a 14-state trip from rail history site
feed.summary: Union Pacific's legendary Big Boy No. 4014 steam locomotive has started its first-ever coast-to-coast tour, celebrating America’s 250th anniversary. The tour began at the historic Milepost 0 in Sacramento, California, the site where the first transcontinental railroad construction started. Big Boy will travel through 14 states, including a Fourth of July stop in Philadelphia, covering routes from California to New York before concluding in Cheyenne, Wyoming.

feed.title: Axon director McBrady will not seek re-election in 2026
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise Inc. announced that director Matthew McBrady will not seek re-election at the company's 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. McBrady informed the board on April 6, 2026, and will continue his service until his term expires. His decision was not due to any disagreement with Axon's operations or policies, and the board expressed appreciation for his contributions.

feed.title: ITW Maintains Overweight Rating -- Price Target Lowered to $303
feed.summary: JP Morgan analyst Tami Zakaria lowered the price target for Illinois Tool Works Inc (NYSE:ITW) from $327 to $303, while maintaining an Overweight rating. Despite the lowered target, the company's GF Score™ of 88/100 indicates strong overall performance, though it's currently considered 3.6% overvalued by GuruFocus. Insider selling activity, totaling $55.0 million in shares over the last three months, suggests some caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. Class A stock (US02079K3059): Is AI dominance strong enough to drive fresh upside now?
feed.summary: This article examines Alphabet Inc. Class A stock, focusing on whether its AI dominance in areas like Search, Cloud, and YouTube can drive sustained growth for investors. It details Alphabet's business model, competitive position, and strategic outlook, highlighting its core advertising revenue, Google Cloud's expansion, and the impact of AI integration. The piece also discusses investor sentiment, analyst views, and potential risks, including regulatory scrutiny and competition, making it relevant for U.S. investors tracking tech leaders.

feed.title: Tri-Continental Corporation (TY) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive financial information for Tri-Continental Corporation (TY), including its stock price, news, and historical data. It offers an overview of the company as a closed-ended equity mutual fund managed by Columbia Management Investment Advisers, LLC, focusing on large-cap U.S. public equity markets. Key metrics like performance, valuation, profitability, balance sheet details, and comparisons with similar asset management companies are also presented.

feed.title: Udemy (NASDAQ:UDMY) Hits New Low Amid Nasdaq Index Pressure
feed.summary: Udemy (NASDAQ:UDMY) has reached a new low point, primarily due to prevailing trends on the Nasdaq index. This market pressure is significantly impacting digital learning platforms like Udemy. The article highlights that these broader market movements are affecting Udemy's valuation and market positioning.

feed.title: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) Hits New 52-Week Low - Here's Why
feed.summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) shares reached a new 52-week low of $35.51 after missing Q1 earnings and revenue expectations ($0.64 EPS vs. $0.73 expected; $4.44B revenue vs. $4.53B expected). Several analysts subsequently lowered their price targets, resulting in an average "Reduce" rating and a target of $43.44. Despite the stock pressure, the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.61 (6.9% yield), with the ex-dividend date on April 10th.

feed.title: Devon Energy Details Pro Forma Impact of Coterra Merger
feed.summary: Devon Energy has released unaudited pro forma financial statements for 2025, detailing the potential impact of its all-stock merger with Coterra Energy. These preliminary figures illustrate how the combined entity's finances might appear, though they exclude cost synergies and are subject to change upon the merger's closing and final valuations. Devon emphasizes these statements are illustrative and not a forecast of future performance.

feed.title: Venture Global Secures $1.75 Billion Term Loan Facility
feed.summary: Venture Global's subsidiary, Calcasieu Pass Funding, LLC, successfully closed a $1.75 billion senior secured term loan B facility on April 10, 2026. This refinancing deal significantly lowers the company's cost of capital, strengthens its balance sheet, and provides greater financial flexibility to support its LNG growth strategy. The proceeds were primarily used to redeem preferred equity and for general corporate purposes, with analysts maintaining a Buy rating on VG stock.

feed.title: Director McBrady to exit Axon (NASDAQ: AXON) board at 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Axon Enterprise, Inc. announced that director Matthew McBrady will not seek re-election at the company's 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. He will continue to serve until his term expires at the meeting, and his departure is not due to any disagreements with Axon's operations or policies. The Board acknowledged and appreciated his contributions to the company's growth during his service.

feed.title: Fastenal declares $0.24 quarterly dividend, payable May 26
feed.summary: Fastenal Company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.24 per share, payable on May 26, 2026, marking an increase from previous quarters and continuing its 34-year streak of dividend payments. The company also declared total dividends of $1,004.2 million in 2025 and $893.3 million in 2024. Despite its strong stock performance and significant share repurchases, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: [S-3ASR] DEVON ENERGY CORP/DE SEC Filing
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corporation filed an S-3ASR shelf registration statement on April 10, 2026, to allow for the future offering of various securities, including common stock and debt. The filing details a planned all-stock merger with Coterra Energy Inc., where Coterra shareholders will receive 0.70 shares of Devon common stock per Coterra share. It also requests an increase in authorized common and preferred shares, subject to stockholder approval, to support the merger and future financial flexibility.

feed.title: [144] MCDONALDS CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing (Form 144) for McDonald's Corp (MCD) reports the exercise of stock options by Joseph Erlinger on April 10, 2026, for 2,626 shares, acquired with cash. The filing also details multiple 10b5-1 sales made by Joseph Erlinger between January and March 2026, involving varying share amounts and corresponding proceeds. The filing is presented as routine compliance disclosure rather than a material corporate event.

feed.title: Unusual Machines Expands Orlando Motor Plant Production Capacity
feed.summary: Unusual Machines (UMAC) has significantly increased production capacity at its Orlando motor manufacturing facility, now operational with second and third shifts, producing around 15,000 motors per month. The company plans to double daily production from 700 to 1,500 parts and aims for further scaling with automated production lines in late 2026 to strengthen its position in the U.S. drone supply chain. Despite rapid revenue growth and a strong balance sheet, Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates UMAC as Neutral due to large net losses, accelerating cash burn, and weak technicals.

feed.title: Beyond Air Received Notice of Delisting
feed.summary: Beyond Air (XAIR) received a delisting notice from Nasdaq due to failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement for 30 consecutive business days. The company, which is ineligible for a compliance period due to a prior reverse split, intends to request a hearing by April 14, 2026, which will temporarily stay the delisting action.

feed.title: Nasdaq warns Beyond Air (NASDAQ: XAIR) on sub-$1 bid price and listing risk
feed.summary: Beyond Air (NASDAQ: XAIR) has received a notice from Nasdaq due to its common stock failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement for 30 consecutive business days. Because the company executed a 1-for-20 reverse stock split in July 2025, it is not eligible for the standard 180-day compliance period. Beyond Air plans to request a hearing with the Nasdaq Hearings Panel by April 14, 2026, to appeal the delisting risk and explore options, including another reverse stock split, to regain compliance.

feed.title: Vera Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Vera Therapeutics, Inc. announced inducement awards to 89 new employees, consisting of non-qualified stock options to purchase 258,200 shares and restricted stock units (RSUs) for 131,925 shares of Class A common stock. These grants were made under the company's 2024 Inducement Plan and approved by the Compensation Committee in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The stock options and RSU awards will vest over four years, subject to continued employment.

feed.title: Vera Therapeutics issues stock awards to 89 new employees
feed.summary: Vera Therapeutics announced it granted inducement awards to 89 new employees on April 8, 2026, under its 2024 Inducement Plan. These awards include non-qualified stock options for 258,200 shares and restricted stock units (RSUs) for 131,925 shares. The stock options have an exercise price of $40.33 and both options and RSUs vest over four years, aligning with Vera Therapeutics' strategy of using equity for hiring and retention.

feed.title: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) taps veteran Kyle Epley as new CFO
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. has announced a planned CFO transition, appointing Kyle Epley as the new CFO effective May 1, 2026. Epley, a Caterpillar veteran since 1996, will succeed Andrew R.J. Bonfield, who will retire on October 1, 2026, after eight years and a period of record financial performance for the company. The transition will involve Bonfield serving in an advisory role until his retirement to ensure a smooth handover.

feed.title: Virtuix (VTIX) CEO logs 14,423-share sale under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Virtuix Holdings Inc. CEO Jan Roger Goetgeluk sold a total of 14,423 shares of Class A common stock in two open-market transactions on April 8 and April 9, 2026, at prices of $6.20 and $6.41 per share, respectively. These sales were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted prior to the company’s direct listing. After these transactions, the CEO directly holds 4,475,305 shares of Virtuix Class A common stock.

feed.title: Village Super Market (VLGEA) finance VP sells 3,719 shares
feed.summary: Luigi Perri, VP of Finance & CAO at Village Super Market Inc. (VLGEA), sold 3,719 shares of Class A common stock on April 9, 2026, at a weighted average price of $45.044 per share. This open-market transaction, detailed in a Form 4 filing, resulted in a sale value of approximately $168,000. After the sale, Perri directly owns 15,839 shares of the company.

feed.title: Village Super Market (VLGEA) CEO sells 12,702 Class A shares
feed.summary: Village Super Market Inc. CEO John James Sumas sold 12,702 Class A Common Stock shares on April 8, 2026, at a weighted average price of $43.16 per share. Following this transaction, he directly holds 36,050 Class A shares and indirectly holds an additional 71,513 shares through family trusts. The sale is described as a routine liquidity event due to his substantial remaining equity stake.

feed.title: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (FIS) fell by 4.24% on Friday, closing at $43.37. This underperformance occurred during a generally negative trading session for the stock market, with both the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also declining. This marks the second consecutive day of losses for the stock.

feed.title: Fertitta-linked firm writes call options on Wynn (WYNN) stake
feed.summary: Entities associated with Tilman J. Fertitta, specifically Hospitality Headquarters, Inc., sold 400,000 call options referencing Wynn Resorts (WYNN) common stock on April 8, 2026. These options, with various exercise prices and an October 9, 2026 expiration date, create an obligation to sell shares if exercised. Tilman Fertitta is deemed to share beneficial ownership through his control of related entities.

feed.title: Veteran healthcare investor Robert Field joins Humana's board
feed.summary: Humana Inc. announced that Robert S. Field has been elected to its Board of Directors, effective immediately after the company's 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Field, who is the Principal and Managing Member of ηMed Capital Management LLC, brings over two decades of healthcare investment experience, including expertise in managed care, risk oversight, and capital allocation. His appointment is expected to provide significant insight as Humana pursues its strategy for profitable growth and long-term shareholder value.

feed.title: NIKE (NKE) director John Rogers Jr. adds 4,000 Class B shares
feed.summary: NIKE, Inc. director John W. Rogers Jr. purchased 4,000 shares of NIKE Class B Common Stock in an open-market transaction at an average price of $43.34 per share. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 41,022 shares. The purchase aligns with the company's policy allowing market trades by officers and directors after quarterly earnings releases or under approved Rule 10b5-1 trading plans.

feed.title: FS KKR Capital (NYSE: FSK) plans new investor presentations online
feed.summary: FS KKR Capital Corp. announced it will post updated investor presentations on its website after market close on April 10, 2026. These materials will be found under the "Events & Presentations" page in the "For Investors" section. The company emphasized that it has no obligation to update or revise these presentations, except as required by federal securities laws, and included standard cautionary language regarding forward-looking statements.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (NYSE: TPL) adds to Texas Pacific Land stake
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp with over a ten percent stake, purchased 1 share of TPL common stock for $401.64 on April 9, 2026. This open-market transaction increased their direct holdings to 3,435,493 shares. A previous Schedule 13D amendment on March 26, 2026, indicated beneficial ownership of 10,050,070 shares.

feed.title: Walmart Inc. stock (US9311421039): Is its everyday low price strategy still the real test amid U.S. retail shifts?
feed.summary: This article examines Walmart's (WMT) business model and its ability to maintain its everyday low price strategy amidst U.S. retail shifts, inflation, and increased e-commerce competition. It highlights Walmart's core segments, competitive advantages in groceries and omnichannel retail, and its appeal to U.S. investors seeking stable, dividend-paying stocks. The piece also addresses industry drivers, risks, and analyst views on Walmart's future.

feed.title: Voyager Therapeutics (VYGR) asks shareholders to approve 245M authorized shares
feed.summary: Voyager Therapeutics is seeking shareholder approval to increase its authorized shares from 125,000,000 to 245,000,000 at its 2026 Annual Meeting. This increase, along with other proposals such as director elections and executive compensation advisory vote, aims to provide financial flexibility for future growth and capital-raising initiatives. The virtual meeting for stockholders will be held on June 9, 2026, with a record date of April 13, 2026.

feed.title: Unusual Machines Inc - Expects To More Than Double Daily Motor Production At Orlando Facility - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Unusual Machines Inc. (UMAC) announced in an SEC filing that it expects to more than double its daily motor production at its Orlando facility. This brief report, sourced from Reuters via Refinitiv, indicates a significant planned increase in manufacturing capacity for the company.

feed.title: Regency Centers (REG) registers 100,000 shares for dividend reinvestment plan
feed.summary: Regency Centers Corporation (REG) has registered up to 100,000 shares of common stock for its Dividend Reinvestment and Stock Purchase Plan. This plan allows existing shareholders to reinvest cash dividends and make optional cash purchases. The prospectus supplement details the plan's mechanics, including purchase methods, participant limits, fee structures, and the administration by Broadridge Corporate Issuer Solutions, LLC.

feed.title: Costco's Comparable Sales Stay Resilient Despite Calendar Headwind
feed.summary: Costco demonstrated strong comparable sales growth in March, rising 9.4% year-over-year, despite facing a calendar headwind of one less shopping day due to the Easter shift. The retailer's digital comparable sales surged by 23.3%, contributing to an 11.3% increase in net sales to $28.41 billion. Analysts predict continued growth for Costco, driven by its competitive pricing, membership model, and expanding omnichannel presence, despite a premium valuation compared to its industry peers.

feed.title: Defiance Gold Enhanced Options Income ETF (GLDY) and Defiance Oil Enhanced Options Income ETF (USOY) Trading Halt
feed.summary: Tidal Investments LLC announced a trading halt for Defiance Gold Enhanced Options Income ETF (GLDY) and Defiance Oil Enhanced Options Income ETF (USOY). This halt was to re-evaluate and correct the Net Asset Values (NAVs) per share published on April 9, 2026, for both funds. The NAV for GLDY was restated from $15.32 to $15.55 per share, and for USOY, it was restated from $8.10 to $8.54 per share.

feed.title: Executive pay, equity plan and leadership structure at Verisign (NASDAQ: VRSN)
feed.summary: Verisign is holding its 2026 Annual Meeting where shareholders will vote on critical proposals including the election of seven directors, an advisory vote on 2025 executive compensation, and the extension of the 2006 Equity Incentive Plan. The company emphasizes that a significant portion of executive remuneration is performance-based, linked to financial metrics such as revenue and operating margin, and that its board structure includes a lead independent director to provide robust oversight. Shareholders will also consider a proposal for an independent board chair, which the current Board recommends against, citing existing strong governance practices.
